titleStmt.title: SII 38.248: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 248. (A.R. No. 248 of 1912.) TIRUVEḶAVĀYIL, PONNERI TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a slab setup in the Vēḷavayilēsvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. Begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Tirumaṉṉivaḷara, which is however, damaged. It records the gift of land, freed from taxes, by the ūrārs of Tattamuñji and Attimaṇichchēri for providing food offerings to the God Rishabhavāhaṇa-dēvar of Svāmīśvaram-uḍaiyār temple at Tiruvaḷḷivāyil. It is also stated that the nagarattār of Iḷa-nilai Kāṭṭūr alias Rājēndrachōḻapuram and the ūrār of Tiruvaḷḷivāyil made a similar gift for the same purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum por
ttaniccelviyum taṉperunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa ne luḻi
ṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarvaṉavelippaṭar vaṉavāciyum cu cūḻ
koḷḷippākaiyum naṇṇaru karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭak poru
Īḻattaracar ta muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil mu
pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta [ cun=taramuṭiyum] Intiraṉāramu
ḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikeraḷaṉ muṟaimayi
ṉamākiya palpukaḻ ceṅkatirmālai
�l peruṅkāval palpaḻantivum ceruviṟciṉavil Iru toru
Aracar kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cāntimattivu A Irutti
cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimikamuyaṅ l mutu
ṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkan Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum(piṭiyil) muḻutir
lakkamum navaṉitikkulappe mum
ṭavalle maturamaṇṭalamum kā(miṭai)vaḷai
veñcilai virapañca tintira
Ayarvil vaṇkirttiyāti tiraṉṟol niṟai ku
viḷaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭumpiṭittu ceru
lataṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭaruṉ cerumiḷai
ṟ kocalai nāṭum taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻit
ṇai kirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovintacantaṉ māviḻi
taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭaṟcaṅkoṭu
veñcamar viḷākattuñcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉai
ccaṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅkapaṉmanākiya kiṭārattaraya
poru kaṭak kumpakkariyoṭumakapaṭutturi
peruṉetippiṟakkamum Ārttavarnakane kaṭa porttoḻil vā
viccādharat toraṇamum moyttoḷiṟp puṉamaṇip
maṇikkatavamum niṟaiśir vicaiyamum tuṟainirppaṉ
vaṉamalai Ura viṟpoṉmalai ŪThe letter resembles ‘ā’rum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ ḻa
riṭaṅkamum kalaṅkāval pukaḻ Ilaṅkācokamum kā
māppapoḷamum kāvalampuricaimevilipaṅkamum
ntūṟuṭai vaḷappaintūṟun
viḷamar tolviḷaimar
kellai Attimaṇicceri Ellaikku meṟkum ten
pāṟkellai Attimaṇicceri Ellaikku vaṭakkum
melpāṟkellai Attimaṇicceri Ellaikkuk
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Attimaṇicceri Ellai
kkut teṟkum Āka Iraṇṭu tiṟattu nilamum Uṇṇi
lamoḻiviṉṟi Iṟai Iḻicci kapālatārai ceytu
kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom tattamuñci Ūrom Iṉnila
Attimaṇicceriūrom tiruvaḷḷaivāyil svā
miśvaramuṭaiyār koyilil ṛṣabhavāhanadevarkku ti
ruamutukkuk kapālatārai ceyta nilattukku kiḻpāṟ
kellai Attimaṇicceriyānābaiśvarattu viṭaṅkark
ku vaitta paṭṭikku meṟkum tenpākkellai Idevar
ku civanapaṭṭi Oru veliyiṉukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ
kellai Attimaṇicceri nilam paṭṭālakaṉukkuk kiḻa
kkum melpāṟkellai meṟpaṭi Ellai Āccapi
ṭāran kalceṟuvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eta
ti kuṇṭilukkum Iraṭṭanpaṭṭikku teṟkum Iṉnilam
Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi Iṟaiiḻicci kapālatārai
ceytu kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Attimaṇicceri Ū
rom Iḷanilaikāṭṭurāṉa rājendracoḻapurattu naka
ttom tiruvaḷḷaivāyiluṭaiyār koyilil vra
ṣabhavāhanadevarkku Iṟaiiḻicci kapālatārai ce
ytu kuṭutta nilam caripaḷḷattiṉ melaicceṭṭi
perumāṉ ceṟuviṟku kiḻpāṟkellai niroṭukā
liṉ meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Attimaṇicceri
Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kiḷaiviraṉāna ma
ṭṭattukkum peykkollaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkel
lai tāna meyanceṟuviṟku kuṇṭil kaḷakkuṇ
kkum Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi Iṟai Iḻicci kapālatā
rai ceytukuṭuttom rājendracoḻapurattu nakaratto
m Iḷanilai tiruvaḷḷaivāyilūrom svāmiśvaramu
ṭaiyārkoyilil vraṣabhavāhanadevarkku Iṟaiiḻicci
Digital edition of SII 38.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
